zh.name: 能量
zh.description: 维持生命活动和身体功能所必需的能量来源。

en.name: Energy
en.description: Essential energy source for life activities and bodily functions.

zh.name: 蛋白质
zh.description: 构成身体组织的重要成分，参与修复和生长。

en.name: Protein
en.description: A key component for building body tissues, involved in repair and growth.

zh.name: 脂肪
zh.description: 提供能量，帮助吸收脂溶性维生素，保护器官。

en.name: Fat
en.description: Provides energy, aids in the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins, and protects organs.

zh.name: 碳水化合物
zh.description: 身体最主要的能量来源。

en.name: Carbohydrate
en.description: The body's primary source of energy.

zh.name: 膳食纤维
zh.description: 促进肠道健康，预防便秘。

en.name: Dietary Fiber
en.description: Promotes gut health and prevents constipation.

zh.name: 水
zh.description: 维持生命必需，参与营养运输和体温调节。

en.name: Water
en.description: Essential for life, involved in nutrient transport and temperature regulation.

zh.name: 维生素A
zh.description: 维持视力、皮肤健康和免疫功能。[reference:2][reference:3]

en.name: Vitamin A
en.description: Maintains vision, skin health, and immune function.

zh.name: 维生素D
zh.description: 促进钙吸收，维护骨骼健康。[reference:4]

en.name: Vitamin D
en.description: Promotes calcium absorption and maintains bone health.

zh.name: 维生素E
zh.description: 抗氧化，保护细胞免受损伤。[reference:5]

en.name: Vitamin E
en.description: Acts as an antioxidant, protecting cells from damage.

zh.name: 维生素K
zh.description: 参与凝血过程，维护骨骼健康。[reference:6]

en.name: Vitamin K
en.description: Involved in blood clotting and maintaining bone health.

zh.name: 维生素B1
zh.description: 参与能量代谢，维护神经系统功能。[reference:7][reference:8]

en.name: Vitamin B1
en.description: Involved in energy metabolism and maintaining nervous system function.

zh.name: 维生素B2
zh.description: 参与能量代谢，维护皮肤和黏膜健康。[reference:9][reference:10]

en.name: Vitamin B2
en.description: Involved in energy metabolism and maintaining skin and mucous membrane health.

zh.name: 烟酸
zh.description: 参与能量代谢，维护神经系统和皮肤健康。[reference:11][reference:12]

en.name: Niacin
en.description: Involved in energy metabolism and maintaining nervous system and skin health.

zh.name: 维生素B6
zh.description: 参与蛋白质代谢和红细胞生成。[reference:13][reference:14]

en.name: Vitamin B6
en.description: Involved in protein metabolism and red blood cell production.

zh.name: 叶酸
zh.description: 参与细胞分裂和生长，对胎儿发育至关重要。[reference:15][reference:16]

en.name: Folate
en.description: Involved in cell division and growth, crucial for fetal development.

zh.name: 维生素B12
zh.description: 参与红细胞生成和神经系统功能。[reference:17][reference:18]

en.name: Vitamin B12
en.description: Involved in red blood cell production and nervous system function.

zh.name: 泛酸
zh.description: 参与能量代谢和脂肪酸合成。[reference:19][reference:20]

en.name: Pantothenic Acid
en.description: Involved in energy metabolism and fatty acid synthesis.

zh.name: 生物素
zh.description: 参与能量代谢和脂肪酸合成。[reference:21][reference:22]

en.name: Biotin
en.description: Involved in energy metabolism and fatty acid synthesis.

zh.name: 胆碱
zh.description: 参与细胞膜结构和神经递质合成。[reference:23][reference:24]

en.name: Choline
en.description: Involved in cell membrane structure and neurotransmitter synthesis.

zh.name: 维生素C
zh.description: 抗氧化，促进铁吸收和胶原蛋白合成。[reference:25][reference:26]

en.name: Vitamin C
en.description: Acts as an antioxidant, enhances iron absorption, and is involved in collagen synthesis.

zh.name: 钙
zh.description: 构成骨骼和牙齿，参与神经传导和肌肉收缩。[reference:27][reference:28]

en.name: Calcium
en.description: A major component of bones and teeth, involved in nerve transmission and muscle contraction.

zh.name: 磷
zh.description: 构成骨骼和牙齿，参与能量代谢。[reference:29]

en.name: Phosphorus
en.description: A component of bones and teeth, involved in energy metabolism.

zh.name: 钾
zh.description: 维持体液平衡和神经肌肉功能。[reference:30][reference:31]

en.name: Potassium
en.description: Maintains fluid balance and neuromuscular function.

zh.name: 钠
zh.description: 维持体液平衡和神经信号传导。[reference:32][reference:33]

en.name: Sodium
en.description: Maintains fluid balance and nerve signal transmission.

zh.name: 镁
zh.description: 参与多种酶的激活和骨骼构成。[reference:34][reference:35]

en.name: Magnesium
en.description: Involved in the activation of many enzymes and bone structure.

zh.name: 氯
zh.description: 维持体液平衡和胃酸形成。[reference:36]

en.name: Chloride
en.description: Maintains fluid balance and is involved in stomach acid formation.

zh.name: 硫
zh.description: 参与蛋白质和酶的构成。[reference:37]

en.name: Sulfur
en.description: A component of proteins and enzymes.

zh.name: 铁
zh.description: 参与血红蛋白合成和氧气运输。[reference:38][reference:39]

en.name: Iron
en.description: Involved in hemoglobin synthesis and oxygen transport.

zh.name: 锌
zh.description: 参与免疫功能和细胞分裂。[reference:40]

en.name: Zinc
en.description: Involved in immune function and cell division.

zh.name: 铜
zh.description: 参与铁代谢和神经系统功能。[reference:41]

en.name: Copper
en.description: Involved in iron metabolism and nervous system function.

zh.name: 锰
zh.description: 参与骨骼发育和代谢。[reference:42]

en.name: Manganese
en.description: Involved in bone development and metabolism.

zh.name: 碘
zh.description: 参与甲状腺激素合成。[reference:43]

en.name: Iodine
en.description: Involved in thyroid hormone synthesis.

zh.name: 硒
zh.description: 抗氧化，保护细胞免受损伤。[reference:44]

en.name: Selenium
en.description: Acts as an antioxidant, protecting cells from damage.

zh.name: 铬
zh.description: 参与糖代谢和胰岛素功能。[reference:45]

en.name: Chromium
en.description: Involved in glucose metabolism and insulin function.

zh.name: 钼
zh.description: 参与某些酶的活性。[reference:46]

en.name: Molybdenum
en.description: Involved in the activity of certain enzymes.

zh.name: 钴
zh.description: 维生素B12的组成部分。[reference:47]

en.name: Cobalt
en.description: A component of vitamin B12.

zh.name: 氟
zh.description: 预防龋齿，维护骨骼健康。[reference:48]

en.name: Fluoride
en.description: Prevents dental caries and maintains bone health.

zh.name: α-亚麻酸
zh.description: 人体必需的ω-3脂肪酸。[reference:49]

en.name: α-Linolenic Acid
en.description: An essential omega-3 fatty acid.

zh.name: 亚油酸
zh.description: 人体必需的ω-6脂肪酸。[reference:50]

en.name: Linoleic Acid
en.description: An essential omega-6 fatty acid.

zh.name: EPA+DHA
zh.description: 长链多不饱和脂肪酸，对心血管和大脑健康有益。[reference:51]

en.name: EPA+DHA
en.description: Long-chain polyunsaturated fatty acids beneficial for cardiovascular and brain health.

zh.name: 异亮氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:52]

en.name: Isoleucine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 亮氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:53]

en.name: Leucine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 赖氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:54]

en.name: Lysine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 蛋氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:55]

en.name: Methionine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 苯丙氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:56]

en.name: Phenylalanine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 苏氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:57]

en.name: Threonine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 色氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:58]

en.name: Tryptophan
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 缬氨酸
zh.description: 人体必需氨基酸之一。[reference:59]

en.name: Valine
en.description: An essential amino acid.

zh.name: 组氨酸
zh.description: 婴幼儿必需氨基酸。[reference:60]

en.name: Histidine
en.description: An essential amino acid for infants.
